description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house with a symmetrical facade and a prominent central entryway. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored stone or brick, contrasted by a dark, multi-gabled roof. The front features a grand arched entry with columns and a decorative pediment above the main door, flanked by large rectangular windows. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway, walkways, and a manicured lawn. Windows are arranged in balanced rows, and the roofline includes dormers and chimneys, adding architectural interest. The overall design suggests a blend of Neoclassical and Colonial Revival styles, emphasizing formality and grandeur.
description: A stately two-story house with a light stone exterior, dark gabled roof, symmetrical windows, and a grand arched entryway, set on a landscaped lot with driveway and walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entryway with columns, symmetrical windows, and the driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, side windows, and the extension of the driveway and lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and the curved walkway across the lawn.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more side windows, the lawn, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Grand arched entry with columns, decorative pediment, and steps leading to a prominent front door
